no-restricted-syntax.message: Question/card text fields can contain $$...$$ LaTeX. Render them with <MathText text={...} /> (components/ui/MathText.tsx) instead of interpolating directly, or the raw delimiters will leak through unrendered.

Question/card text fields can contain $$...$$ LaTeX. Do not interpolate them into a template literal for JSX text (including inside a ternary/conditional) — render them with <MathText text={...} /> instead.
